content.text:
{
  "ok": true,
  "status": 0,
  "statusText": "DRY_RUN",
  "method": "POST",
  "url": "https://trading.robinhood.com/api/v2/crypto/trading/orders/",
  "path": "/api/v2/crypto/trading/orders/",
  "risk": "write-mutate",
  "mutatesAccount": true,
  "requiresAuth": true,
  "contentType": "application/json",
  "body": "{
  "url": "https://trading.robinhood.com/api/v2/crypto/trading/orders/",
  "path": "/api/v2/crypto/trading/orders/",
  "method": "POST",
  "risk": "write-mutate",
  "categories": [
    "crypto",
    "official",
    "trading",
    "orders-write"
  ],
  "missingParams": [],
  "warnings": [
    "Write route. Personal CLI executes live unless --dry-run is used."
  ],
  "command": "curl -sS -X POST \"https://trading.robinhood.com/api/v2/crypto/trading/orders/\" -H \"x-api-key: $ROBINHOOD_CRYPTO_API_KEY\" -H \"x-timestamp: <unix-seconds>\" -H \"x-signature: <ed25519-signature>\"",
  "mode": "dry_run",
  "mutatesAccount": true,
  "requiresAuth": true,
  "body": "{\"client_order_id\":\"00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000000\",\"side\":\"buy\",\"symbol\":\"BTC-USD\",\"type\":\"market\",\"market_order_config\":{\"asset_quantity\":\"0.0001\"}}",
  "authHeaders": [
    "x-api-key",
    "x-timestamp",
    "x-signature"
  ]
}",
  "truncated": false
}
